'bg-green-500 !text-white' : (variables['d9e0f1a2-b3c4-5678-defa-789012345678'] === 'contact' ? 'bg-[var(--theme-primary)] !text-white' : 'bg-[var(--theme-muted)] !text-[var(--theme-muted-foreground)]'))

sc-counter-card.name: Counter Card
sc-counter-card.description: Demo component showcasing WeWeb-style scoped variables, properties, and workflows. Each instance has an independent counter.

sc-calendar.name: Calendar (DatePicker)
sc-calendar.description: Realistic date picker that exercises every component-lifecycle trigger (created, mounted, propertyChange, beforeUnmount) and common workflow step types (branch, multiOptionBranch, forEach, whileLoop, break/continue, passThroughCondition, timeDelay, navigateTo, navigatePrev, changeVariableValue, setVar, resetVariableValue, executeComponentAction, returnValue). Each instance has an independent year/month/selected-date, its own grid, and its own last-action log.

cal-wf-rebuild-grid.name: Rebuild Grid
cal-wf-rebuild-grid.description: Rebuild the 42-cell grid for the current year/month. One changeVariableValue computes the grid in bulk; a follow-up forEach iterates weekdays to stamp cal-v-last-action so the forEach step is demonstrated.

value.formula: Array.from({length:42},(_,i)=>{const yr=context?.component?.variables?.['cal-v-year-uuid']??2026;const mo=context?.component?.variables?.['cal-v-month-uuid']??0;const fd=new Date(yr,mo,1).getDay();const dim=new Date(yr,mo+1,0).getDate();const dn=i-fd+1;const inM=dn>=1&&dn<=dim;const d=dn<1?new Date(yr,mo,0).getDate()+dn:(dn>dim?dn-dim:dn);const ds=inM?yr+'-'+String(mo+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(d).padStart(2,'0'):'';const today=new Date();const tStr=today.getFullYear()+'-'+String(today.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+'-'+String(today.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const sel=context?.component?.variables?.['cal-v-selected-date-uuid']||'';return{day:d,inMonth:inM,dateStr:ds,isToday:ds===tStr,isSelected:ds===sel&&ds.length>0,idx:i}})

cal-wf-select-day.name: Select Day
cal-wf-select-day.description: Select a date passed via args.date. passThroughCondition enforces minDate/maxDate; timeDelay gives visual feedback; returnValue surfaces the chosen date to the caller.

value.formula: new Date().getFullYear() + '-' + String(new Date().getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(new Date().getDate()).padStart(2,'0')

cal-wf-find-next-workday.name: Find Next Workday
cal-wf-find-next-workday.description: Advance the selected date by whole days, skipping Saturdays/Sundays. Uses whileLoop + branch + continueLoop/breakLoop to demonstrate loop-control step types.

value.formula: new Date().getFullYear() + '-' + String(new Date().getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(new Date().getDate()).padStart(2,'0')

cal-wf-classify-date.name: Classify Selected Weekday
cal-wf-classify-date.description: Read the weekday (0-6) of the selected date and branch to a different log message per weekday group.

sc-calendar-workflow-zoo.description: Companion to sc-calendar: exposes one button per component-scoped workflow step type that the calendar does NOT already demonstrate.
